name: add-format
instruction: Modify `lookup_info` so it returns `"name (category)"` format instead of just the name. For example, if the product is named "Laptop" with category "tech", return `"Laptop (tech)"`. Use string interpolation: `"${p.name} (${p.category})"`. If not found, keep returning `"not found"`. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. String interpolation: `"${expr}"`. `list.sort_by(xs, (x) => key)` sorts ascending. `list.reverse(xs)` reverses a list.
